opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Clear Flow has no online booking, no booking tools detected, and is phone-only contact.
opportunities.observation: After-hours plumbing calls in Boise go unanswered, sending urgent leads to competitors.
opportunities.fix: Deploy an AI booking widget capturing emergency and scheduled jobs 24/7 without staff.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected; phone-only contact means zero digital lead tracking.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked or missed call from Boise customers vanishes with no follow-up possible.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call capture and CRM logging to record, transcribe, and tag every inbound call.

opportunities.label: Post-Job Follow-Up
opportunities.signal: Only 94 reviews despite operating in Boise; no review-request or loyalty automation detected.
opportunities.observation: Low review velocity suggests completed jobs generate no automated follow-up or referral requests.
opportunities.fix: Automate post-job SMS sequences requesting Google reviews and offering seasonal maintenance reminders.
